req.title: Immunization record (negative)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement mandates that an Immunization record's administered date must not be in the future. Test coverage requires: (1) a positive EP case using a valid past date to confirm 201 creation, (2) a negative NEG case using a future date to confirm 422 rejection, (3) a BVA boundary case using today's date (the exact allowed upper bound) to confirm 201 acceptance, (4) a DT case covering a missing mandatory field (occurrenceDateTime) to confirm 422, and (5) an STC case verifying that a duplicate submission transitions correctly. This covers EP, BVA, NEG, DT, and STC heuristics as required.

tests.name: test_immunization_valid_past_date_returns_201
preconditions: Valid clinician auth token is available
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to 30 days in the past
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician auth header
expected: Response body contains a resource id
trace: R-HLT-060: administered date not in the future
EP: past date belongs to the valid equivalence partition
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
from <helper_fn> import build_immunization_payload, clinician_headers, fhir_base_url
import requests

def test_immunization_valid_past_date_returns_201():
    occurrence = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = build_immunization_payload(occurrence_date=occurrence)
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body, "Response must contain resource id"
    assert body.get("occurrenceDateTime") == occurrence

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_returns_422
preconditions: Valid clinician auth token is available
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to tomorrow's date
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician auth header
expected: Response body contains an error message referencing the date constraint
trace: R-HLT-060: error pathway — 422 when date > today
NEG: future date is an invalid input; system must reject it
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
from <helper_fn> import build_immunization_payload, clinician_headers, fhir_base_url
import requests

def test_immunization_future_date_returns_422():
    occurrence = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = build_immunization_payload(occurrence_date=occurrence)
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    error_text = str(body)
    assert "date" in error_text.lower() or "occurrence" in error_text.lower(), \
        "Error body should reference the date field"

actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to today's date (upper boundary)
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician auth header
expected: Response body contains a resource id

BVA: on-boundary value (today) must be accepted

import pytest
from datetime import date
from <helper_fn> import build_immunization_payload, clinician_headers, fhir_base_url
import requests

def test_immunization_today_boundary_date_returns_201():
    occurrence = date.today().isoformat()
    payload = build_immunization_payload(occurrence_date=occurrence)
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body, "Response must contain resource id"
    assert body.get("occurrenceDateTime") == occurrence

tests.name: test_immunization_missing_occurrence_date_returns_422
preconditions: Valid clinician auth token is available
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime field omitted entirely
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician auth header
expected: Response body contains an error referencing the missing mandatory occurrenceDateTime element
trace: R-HLT-060: missing mandatory elements must be tested
DT: decision table row — date absent => invalid => 422
tests.executable:
import pytest
from <helper_fn> import build_immunization_payload, clinician_headers, fhir_base_url
import requests

def test_immunization_missing_occurrence_date_returns_422():
    payload = build_immunization_payload(occurrence_date=None)
    payload.pop("occurrenceDateTime", None)
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    error_text = str(body)
    assert "occurrence" in error_text.lower() or "required" in error_text.lower(), \
        "Error should reference the missing mandatory field"

tests.name: test_immunization_duplicate_submission_state_transition
preconditions: Valid clinician auth token is available
An Immunization record for the same patient and vaccine on the same date has already been created
actions: POST a valid Immunization payload to /Immunization (first submission, expects 201)
Extract the resource id from the first response
POST the identical payload again to /Immunization (duplicate submission)
expected: Second POST returns HTTP 409 Conflict or 422 Unprocessable Entity indicating conflicting state
Response body for the second call contains an error message referencing duplicate or conflict
trace: R-HLT-060: conflicting state transitions must be tested
STC: state machine — created state cannot transition back to creating with identical record
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
from <helper_fn> import build_immunization_payload, clinician_headers, fhir_base_url, unique_patient_ref
import requests

def test_immunization_duplicate_submission_state_transition():
    occurrence = (date.today() - timedelta(days=5)).isoformat()
    patient_ref = unique_patient_ref()
    payload = build_immunization_payload(
        occurrence_date=occurrence,
        patient_ref=patient_ref
    )
    first = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert first.status_code == 201, f"Setup failed: {first.status_code} {first.text}"
    second = requests.post(
        f"{fhir_base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers()
    )
    assert second.status_code in (409, 422), \
        f"Expected 409 or 422 for duplicate, got {second.status_code}: {second.text}"
    error_text = str(second.json())
    assert any(k in error_text.lower() for k in ("duplicate", "conflict", "exists")), \
        "Error body should reference conflict or duplicate"
